# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3.8'

networks:
  elk-network:
    driver: bridge

volumes:
  esdata:
    driver: local

services:
  elasticsearch:
    container_name: elasticsearch
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.13.0
    ports:
      - "9200:9200"
      - "9300:9300"
    environment:
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - ELASTIC_PASSWORD=changeme
      - cluster.name=docker-cluster
      - node.name=es01
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
    volumes:
      - esdata:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
    networks:
      - elk-network
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -sS http://localhost:9200/_cluster/health -u elastic:changeme | grep -q \\"status\\":\\"green\\"" || exit 1"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5

  kibana:
    container_name: kibana
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:8.13.0
    ports:
      - "5601:5601"
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME=elastic
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD=changeme
    networks:
      - elk-network
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy

  logstash:
    container_name: logstash
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:8.13.0
    ports:
      - "5044:5044" # Beats input
      - "9600:9600" # Monitoring API
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME=elastic
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD=changeme
      - xpack.monitoring.enabled=true
      # Adjust LS_JAVA_OPTS based on your needs
      # - "LS_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms256m -Xmx256m"
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/pipeline:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline:ro
      - ./logstash/config/logstash.yml:/usr/share/logstash/config/logstash.yml:ro
    networks:
      - elk-network
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy

  apm-server:
    container_name: apm-server
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm/apm-server:8.13.0
    ports:
      - "8200:8200"
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME=elastic
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD=changeme
    volumes:
      - ./apm-server/apm-server.yml:/usr/share/apm-server/apm-server.yml:ro
    networks:
      - elk-network
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
